segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss Windows update issues, Discord problems, and technical troubleshooting

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle recounts Denver Airport experiences: bus boarding inefficiency and passenger incompetence

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle tells story about Delta flight attendant confusion over water vs. iced coffee request

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle shares workplace joke about coffee pouches and 'not my cup of tea' punchline

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss ISS decommissioning, reference frames, physics Reddit debates about pull-ups and treadmills

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss physics, Reddit, third-party apps, NYT crossword paywall, and campaign backgrounds

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Discussion of Notion campaign notes, previous campaign currencies, NPCs returning from campaign one

segments.label: recap
segments.oneLineSummary: Johnny recaps first mega session: fire, dream sequence, meeting Illmari and Iconoclasm, investigating Flynn's death, sewers, augers, satellite dish recovery, Zorbon meeting

segments.label: recap
segments.oneLineSummary: Johnny recaps previous session: satellite dish heist, leveling up, party returns to Sin and Tonic

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players and GM discuss hero points, mythic points, and joke about buying vowels; GM clarifies mattress history

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: GM clarifies tavern layout; Argyle wakes and goes downstairs for breakfast.

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: Anzu asks rules questions about Fanes and hearts; GM explains mechanics and lore with examples.

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players and GM banter about the word 'patchwork' and a previous campaign villain.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party gathers for breakfast; Argyle asks Ginny about fire repellent; Johnny finds ornate fans; discuss to-do list

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party plans to visit supermarket for tinfoil and eggs; discuss tracking Tywelwyn; check on twins about radar dish

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: In-character party discussion about acquiring equipment, weapons, armor, and managing party finances after an adventure.

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss equipment purchases, armor costs, discounts, and party finances; debate buying healing potions vs. plate armor

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Anok offers work at a scrapyard; party discusses job options and decides to visit Johnny's contact before taking work

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party travels to seedier district via trolley; Othello the raven lands on Anzu's shoulder; Johnny explains his background while walking to Undertable pawn shop

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party enters Undertable pawn shop; Johnny reunites with Smiler the centaur fence; Smiler offers Benny a tiny gun and extends friends discount

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party sells items to Smiler at pawn shop; Argyle buys full plate armor with help from Anzu and Johnny

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Anzu examines radios, haggling with Smiler; Johnny aids and delivers message to Donnie via Red

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle's eyes change color in new suit; party finishes shopping at pawn shop

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party heads toward scrapyard; Argyle questions Benny about age and humanoid numbers

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Benny defends permission slip; Anzu checks for firearms clause; GM clarifies Belvedere school and Atum

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party discusses origins: Argyle from farm, Anzu from nest, Johnny from border village; Johnny's tavern 'Last Stop'

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Benny reveals Pulse spoke to him; shows glowing pick; party reacts with surprise

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle shows new business card with doctor license and Iconoclasm; discusses parents as Scale operatives

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party discusses glowing items from dreams, Argyle's new business cards and licensing, and plans to visit the junkyard

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: GM narrates the party's arrival at Sableclutch Scrap, describing the neighborhood and its religious character.

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: GM calls for will saves; players roll, reroll using mythic points, and discuss results with mechanical focus.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: GM narrates arrival at Sableclutch Scrap; party spots Copperjaw operating crusher; Johnny casts musical accompaniment

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party hails Copperjaw; Benny shakes his hand and fails athletics check; Copperjaw grinds his knuckles

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Copperjaw offers two jobs: guarding (70 gp) or moving a locked suitcase (100 gp); party chooses moving

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Anzu asks about dangers; Copperjaw warns of two mysterious people interested in the suitcase; tangent about Michelin guides

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Copperjaw gives Diamond District address; Johnny prestidigitates party; discussion of payment and doorman identification

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party negotiates payment details with Cobblejaw, discusses suitcase constraints and weapons, Anzu arranges aerial reconnaissance with Othello

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: Players and GM discuss mechanics of Anzu's animal companion perception bonus and eye-sharing ability cooldown timing.

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss character identities and backstories out of character; Argyle guesses Mike's character is a pug

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party walks toward trolley with Othello scouting; Johnny questions Benny about entertainment; marching order established

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Goblin pickpocket attempts to steal from Johnny; chase and failed attack; Black Line police officers approach party

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party checks pockets, encounters Blackline cops, gives description of pickpocket goblin, establishes contact via Coppajaw at Sableclutch scrap

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party navigates tense positioning with cops, learns about Officer Smith and Mute, cops depart, party heads to trolley station

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Othello scouts the area and loses sight of the cops; party makes it back to the trolley station without incident.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party arrives at trolley station and waits for train; GM calls for perception check.

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: Rules discussion about vehicle costs, transport between city areas, and slide device mechanics.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party boards trolley at station with other passengers; Benny sits by window, Argyle prepares to talk to groups

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle attempts society check on passengers, identifies factory workers and lost tourists, returns to guard Benny

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Trolley moves to Void 2 station, more passengers board, Johnny notices factory worker surreptitiously watching the briefcase

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party boards tram, GM describes passengers; Argyle guards child, more people board at next station

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Trolley moves to Void 2 station, more passengers board, Johnny notices factory worker surreptitiously watching the briefcase

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Johnny gives orders to spread a message and keep watch on Anaïs; Benny comments on private trams.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Tram reaches final stop; party disembarks, discusses walking vs taxi to destination

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party checks for pursuing goblins, confirms they've gone a different direction, and prepares to move on.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party discusses strategy for ambushing goblins in an alley and scouts for a suitable location.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Two office workers follow party into alley, transform into fleshy mole-rat creatures, combat initiated

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: Initiative setup; discussion of weapon runes, potency progression, mythic role settings in Foundry

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Combat encounter begins; Argyle attacks first creature for 13 damage, Benny intimidates second creature, Ugathol II prepares counterattack

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Benny intimidates Ugathal I with a strike, dealing damage and frightening it; Ugathal II attacks Argyle with claw and grab, then Ugathal I attempts blood nourishment but is interrupted by Benny's cri…

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Johnny casts Courageous Anthem and Soothe, recites a melancholy poem, demoralizes Ugathal II; Anzu recalls knowledge and casts Telekinetic Rend on both creatures.

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle strikes Ugathal I twice and treats wounds; Benny kills Ugathal I with intimidating strike; Ugathal II attempts blood nourishment but is interrupted.

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: GM narrates enemy action (blood nourishment) against Argyle; combat encounter resolution with mechanical action declaration.

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Party finishes combat against Ukathals; Anzu uses telekinetic projectile, Argyle delivers killing blow, party finds badges on corpses

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players and GM banter about adding 'Agent of' to business cards and joking about fraud.

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Post-combat discussion: players and GM discuss enemy stats, crit rolls, weapon builds, and reactive strike mechanics in a casual, joking tone.

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: Rules discussion about weapon potency, armor potency, unarmed attacks, and hand wraps for spellcasters

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss scheduling for next month, travel plans, Noah's book manuscript, and say goodbyes
